contexts.content: ABANDONMENT AND TERMINATION OF ACCESS AND WASTEWATER EASEMENT

This Abandonment and Termination of Access and Wastewater Easement (this "Termination") is executed between East Celina, LLC, a Texas limited liability company ("Grantor") and North Collin County Municipal Utility District No. 1, a political subdivision of the State of Texas, operating under the provisions of Article III, Section 52, Article XVI, Section 50, of the Texas Constitution and Chapters 49 and 54 of the Texas Water Code, as amended ("Grantee").

WHEREAS, Grantor and Grantee previously entered into that certain Access & Wastewater Easement (the "Easement Agreement") recorded at Document Number 2025000014446 in the Official Public Records of Collin County, Texas on February 7, 2025, wherein Grantor granted unto Grantee an access and wastewater easement over and across the Easement Property (as defined in the Easement Agreement);
WHEREAS, Grantor and Grantee have determined to abandon and terminate the Easement Agreement and the easements granted therein;
NOW, THEREFORE, FOR AND IN CONSIDERATION of $10.00 cash in hand paid by Grantor to Grantee, the parties hereby agree as follows:

Grantor and Grantee hereby covenant, acknowledge and agree that immediately upon the recordation of this Termination, the Easement Agreement together with the force main easement and access easements granted therein are abandoned, terminated and released and of no further force and effect.
EXECUTED as of the 12 day of June, 2025.
GRANTOR: East Celina, LLC, a Texas limited liability company

This instrument was acknowledged before me on this 2 day of June, 2025, by Donald Huffines, Manager of East Celina, LLC, a Texas limited liability company, for and on behalf of said limited liability company.
ROXANNE CABRERA Notary ID #12217308 My Commission Expires March 20, 2029
ABANDONMENT AND TERMINATION OF ACCESS AND WASTEWATER EASEMENT 017988.000001\4919-8229-4602.v2
This instrument was acknowledged before me on this 10 day of June, 2025, by Jack Morris President
of North Collin County , Municipal Utility District No. 1, for and on behalf of said municipal utility district.
NOTARY PUSILL AARON BRADSHAW Notary Public. State of Texas STATE OF TEX Comm. Expires 11.11-2028 Notary ID 13516442-6
ABANDONMENT AND TERMINATION OF ACCESS AND WASTEWATER EASEMENT 017988.000001\4919-8229-4602.v2
Collin County Honorable Stacey Kemp Collin County Clerk
Instrument Number: 2025000087817 eRecording - Real Property EASEMENT

THIS PAGE IS PART OF THE INSTRUMENT Any provision herein which restricts the Sale, Rental or use of the described REAL PROPERTY because of color or race is invalid and unenforceable under federal law.
STATE OF TEXAS COUNTY OF COLLIN

I hereby certify that this Instrument was FILED In the File Number sequence on the date/time printed hereon, and was duly RECORDED in the Official Public Records of Collin County, Texas. Honorable Stacey Kemp Collin County Clerk Collin County, TX
